conocer.english: to be familiar with, to know

deber.english: to should, to ought, to owe

dejar.english: to let, to allow, to leave, to leave behind

llevar.english: to take, to carry, to wear

poder.english: to be able to, to can

querer.english: to wish, to want, to love

saber.english: to know a fact, how to do something (present), to find out (preterite)

tomar.english: to take, to ingest, to drink

volver.english: to return, to do something again
